subject: usb: gadget: legacy: fix error return code of multi_bind()

features.post_operation: assignment of negative errno to the function's returned status variable
features.path_conditions: On the NULL-check failure branch of an alloc-like call, the goto leads to a shared error label whose returned status was not set to a negative errno.
features.fit_test_reasoning: The bug fits a compositional 'missing error code' pattern: an acquire-like call (usb_otg_descriptor_alloc) returns a pointer that may be NULL; the NULL-check then-branch performs a goto to a shared cleanup that returns 'status'; the missing post-operation is the assignment of -ENOMEM to status before the goto, so the function silently returns 0. We decompose this into: alloc-like-call, null-check, then-branch-goto, returned-int-status, and the absence-of-assignment combinator.
